summary: Phase E.3 Induction Centre — Backend 13/13 PASS (pytest). Frontend smoke covered manager assign flow, modal stop-propagation (original bug fixed), 16 numbered sections, expand-on-click, status update, staff redirect to own induction, staff RBAC (no assign btn, manager_signoff marked read-only/manager-only), and /policies → Induction packs tab integration (staff-induction-section + cards + open-induction-page deep-link). Found and FIXED one routing bug in induction_routes.py.

fixed_during_testing.issue: GET /api/induction/assignments/mine returned 404 because it was registered AFTER GET /api/induction/assignments/{aid}; FastAPI matched {aid}="mine" first. Reordered so /mine is registered before /{aid}. Also strengthened: prefer active (non-signed-off) assignment, fall back to most recent. This fixes the empty-staff card incorrectly appearing for Alex Staff (who already had assignments). Verified: /mine now returns the active assignment; pytest still 13/13 PASS.

verified_flows: Manager login → /induction renders induction-list-page with Assign induction button (induction-assign-btn).
Click Assign → induction-assign-modal opens. Clicking on select dropdown AND on inner title text does NOT close the modal (original bug fixed; backdrop has no onClick, inner uses stopPropagation).
Select staff (Alex Staff) → Create → list refreshed: card count 2 → 3, new induction-card-{id} appears.

Click card → /induction/{aid} loads induction-detail-page with exactly 16 items in correct order: welcome, policies_procedures, safeguarding, fire_emergency, medication, behaviour_support, missing_from_care, recording_logs, key_working, professional_boundaries, whistleblowing, health_safety, shadow_shifts, supervision, mandatory_training, manager_signoff.
Expand item 'welcome' → induction-item-body-welcome visible, all 3 status buttons (not_started/in_progress/completed) present, induction-notes-welcome textarea present.
Click Complete → progress text updates (visible re-render).
Staff login → /induction redirects to /induction/{their-id} (verified URL contains aid). Assign button NOT shown to staff.

Staff expands manager_signoff item → shows 'Read-only · manager-only item' marker; no induction-status-completed-manager_signoff button rendered (frontend hides; backend would 403 anyway as covered by pytest).
Staff updates own non-signoff item (welcome → in_progress) and Save notes works without console errors.

Manager → /policies → 'Induction packs' tab: staff-induction-section visible with 3 induction-tab-card-* entries and open-induction-page deep-link; clicking deep-link lands on /induction (induction-list-page).
action_items: (Optional) Add a small frontend toast/visual cue when the legacy policy-week 'Induction packs' (week 1..4) modal vs the new staff-induction-section co-exist on the same tab — currently both render in the same tab; consider adding a section divider/heading to avoid confusion. Not a blocker.
critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering: previously /induction/assignments/mine was unreachable due to being registered after /induction/assignments/{aid}. Fixed. Recommend adding a regression test for /mine to test_iteration55_induction.py.
induction_routes.py uses build_routes() with function-scoped handlers; this works but makes future refactoring harder. Acceptable for now.
Frontend StaffInduction.jsx (547 lines) is approaching the 700-line soft cap; consider splitting InductionDetailPage into its own file as it grows.
updated_files: /app/backend/induction_routes.py — reordered /mine endpoint above /{aid}, added active-first selection logic.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 new induction assignment for Alex Staff during manager UI smoke; total active+signed inductions for Alex Staff = 3 in induction_assignments collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend uses new induction_routes module mounted in server.py. Important: when adding new endpoints, ensure specific paths (/assignments/mine) are declared BEFORE parameterized paths (/assignments/{aid}). Routing-order regression risk. The legacy InductionTab policy-week enrolment modal still functions underneath the new staff-induction-section (intentional). All 16 section keys are fixed and unit-tested. induction_assignments collection currently has 3 Alex Staff records (mix of signed and active).
rca of the issue: Bug: /api/induction/assignments/mine → 404. RCA: in build_routes(), the parameterized path /induction/assignments/{aid} was declared before the literal path /induction/assignments/mine. FastAPI matches routes in declaration order; the {aid} route captured aid='mine' and the handler did find_one({'id':'mine'}) → None → raised 404. Repro: GET /api/induction/assignments/mine with staff JWT returned {'detail':'Induction assignment not found'}, HTTP 404. Mitigation: moved /mine endpoint above /{aid} in induction_routes.build_routes(); also improved /mine to prefer active (signed_off_at=None) assignment, falling back to latest. Verified post-fix: /mine returns 200 with assignment payload; pytest 13/13 still passing; UI staff redirect now works.
